title: tests-are-tapes promotion flow
manager: A flow that promotes a test into a tape and a tape into a test — a shrunk fuzz failure becomes a permanent regression tape, and a recorded run becomes an assertion. This is the continuum that unifies testing, fuzzing, and replay: every interesting run can become a durable test, so bugs found by fuzzing never come back, and the test suite grows itself from real executions instead of only from what someone thought to write.
cs: tests-are-tapes promotion (both directions); a shrunk fuzz failure becomes a permanent tape; recorded runs become assertions; the fuzz->regression pipeline.
